name: Pro Worker AI
description: Research-backed AI augmentation that adapts to your expertise level. Coaches you in growth areas, accelerates you in expert areas, and protects you from de-skilling. Based on Buçinca et al. (2021, 2024), Mollick, and Acemoglu.
instructions: See SYSTEM_PROMPT.md — paste the full contents of universal-prompt/SYSTEM_PROMPT.md here when creating the GPT.
conversation_starters: Coach me on a specific skill
Assess me — create my Pro Worker AI profile
Update my profile based on recent work
knowledge_files: Upload your profile (pro-yourname.md) as a knowledge file
setup_instructions: 1. Go to ChatGPT > Explore GPTs > Create a GPT
3. In Configure > Description: paste the description above
4. In Configure > Instructions: paste the FULL contents of universal-prompt/SYSTEM_PROMPT.md
5. In Configure > Conversation starters: add the starters above
6. In Configure > Knowledge: upload your profile .md file
7. Disable Web Browsing, Code Interpreter, and DALL-E (not needed)
9. Use this GPT for all your work conversations
